---
title: "$\mathrm{Out}(F_n)$"
subtitle: ""
format:
  html:
    include-before-body: ../header.html
---
## Motivation

There is a natural map $\mathrn{Out}(F_n) \to \mathrm{GL}_n(\mathbb{Z})$ given by abelianization. This map is onto. And in special case when $n = 2$, this map becomes isomorphism.

Finding the structure of $\mathrm{Out}(F_n)$ and $\mathrm{Aut}(F_n)$ may simplify some group theoretic calculations.

## Resources

[Out(Fn) Notes](https://sites.google.com/view/georgedomat/resources#h.p_8rDTlXJfdAVP)

::: {style="border-top: 1px solid #ddd; padding-top: 10px; margin-top: 20px; color: gray; font-size: 0.8em;"}
Document last rendered: {{< now >}}
:::
